title: Global filter at board level
excerpt:
Hi, 
I would like to suggest an improvement related to filters at board level. 
What about a global filter which can be applied on all views? in additional of existing specific filters set on each views. 
What do you thi…

posts.author: ECH (Emmanuel CHERIGIE)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I would like to suggest an improvement related to filters at board level.

What about a global filter which can be applied on all views? in additional of existing specific filters set on each views.

What do you think about that?
